task_completion.description: Create a 3D representation for a water boiler with the correct IFC class and predefined type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an object in the 3D viewport or Outliner identified as an 'IfcBoiler'. In the Object Properties (Bonsai/BlenderBIM panel), the PredefinedType should be set to 'WATER'.

task_completion.description: Create a 3D representation for a storage tank with the correct IFC class and predefined type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an object in the 3D viewport or Outliner identified as an 'IfcTank'. In the Object Properties, the PredefinedType should be set to 'STORAGE'.

task_completion.description: Create a 3D representation for a circulation pump with the correct IFC class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an object in the 3D viewport or Outliner identified as an 'IfcPump'.
Look in the Scene Properties under the IFC Systems or IFC Project setup panels. There should be an IfcSystem created with the name 'Heating Plant'.

task_completion.description: Assign the boiler, tank, and pump to the 'Heating Plant' system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the IFC Systems panel or the object's system assignment properties. The IfcBoiler, IfcTank, and IfcPump should be listed as components or members of the 'Heating Plant' system.

task_completion.description: Save the enriched project to the specified file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Blender window title bar, a 'Save As' dialog, or a terminal confirmation showing the file saved exactly to '/home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_heating_plant.ifc'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Blender/Bonsai GUI to model the equipment and systems.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Blender interface with the Bonsai/BlenderBIM add-on active, rather than just a text editor or terminal window.

integrity.description: The agent created actual 3D objects in the viewport.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D viewport should display visible geometry for the boiler, tank, and pump, not just empty nodes or renamed existing unrelated objects.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the modeling task using terminal commands to mock the output file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of commands like 'touch /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_heating_plant.ifc' or running a pre-written python script to generate the file without interacting with the UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file path is exactly '/home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_heating_plant.ifc'. The boiler must be an IfcBoiler with PredefinedType 'WATER'. The tank must be an IfcTank with PredefinedType 'STORAGE'. The system name must contain the substring 'heating' (e.g., 'Heating Plant').
